items.title: Owner Platform Initiative
items.description: Owner Platform Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Net proceeds / yield realization and Supply monetization revenue, anchored in lead quality and response speed while affordability pressure constrains supply and conversion and led through Estimation Funnel. The quarter concentrates on affordability pressure, lead quality, and faster response loops for supply-constrained markets so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase net proceeds / yield realization by strengthening estimation funnel and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase price and market fit by strengthening estimation funnel and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase supply monetization revenue by strengthening estimation funnel and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Estimation Funnel with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Price Page with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Owner Coaching Experience with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended FSBO Online Classifieds Acquisition with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Owner Web Application.
Introduced workflow updates in Owner iOS Application.
Introduced workflow updates in Owner Android Application.

items.title: Pro Agency Platform Initiative
items.description: Pro Agency Platform Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Commission revenue growth and B2B ARR, anchored in lead quality and response speed while affordability pressure constrains supply and conversion and led through Pro Tool Foundation. The quarter concentrates on affordability pressure, lead quality, and faster response loops for supply-constrained markets so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase commission revenue growth by strengthening pro tool foundation and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase listing acquisition by strengthening pro tool foundation and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase b2b arr by strengthening pro tool foundation and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Pro Tool Foundation with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Online Classifieds Acquisition with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Classifieds Performance Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Classifieds Visibility Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Pro Portal.
Introduced workflow updates in Listing Ingestion API.
Introduced workflow updates in CRM Integration API.
